title: Brookstone - Memory Foam Lap Desk Tablet Holder, Holds Phones, iPads, E-Book Readers, 2 Viewing Angles, 2 Side Pockets for Accessories, Book Holder Cushion, Perfect Home, Car Travel, Flights, Black
features: TABLET / E-BOOK READER MEMORY FOAM LAPDESK – whether you travel for work or pleasure, use our tablet cushion stand for your device and enjoy the comfort and practicability the triangular design offers. Whether you’re using it on your lap or on a table, the 2 different display angles mean you can work from anywhere.

UNIVERSAL DESIGN – our tablet stand offers a solution to travellers who wish to work, watch videos, participate in webinars and conduct virtual meetings thanks to the fact it can support a range of tablets and devices. Whether it’s an iPad, Kindle, phone, or convertible laptop it can reston our travel tablet cushion in one of 2 angled positions for optimum comfort and viewability.

CONVENIENTLY PLACED STORAGE POCKETS – we have incorporated handy pockets to the sides of our universal tablet cushion which is ideal for storing chargers, a stylus or pen, a screen cleaning cloth, headphones, ear pods or whatever else you need close by for working whilst travelling. The convenient positioning means you can access the pockets whilst working without having to move your device.

WORK FROM ANYWHERE IN COMFORT – make working on the move more comfortable then ever thanks to the soft yet sturdy plush design. Suitable for cars, trains, planes, boats, working in a café or restaurant, outdoors on the decking, by the pool on vacation and so many more places in between. Our plush tablet holder can sit comfortably on your lap or any flat, horizontal surface. Your device will remain in place so you can watch, read, or type without the interference of doing it on the move.

NOT JUST FOR WORK – if you love to travel whilst watching a movie, or perhaps you like to video call friends or family whilst on the move then our tablet device holder is exactly what you need. Regardless of what you’re using your device for our Brookstone tablet cushion will hold your device comfortably whilst you pass the time reading, viewing, or even playing a game! It is the must have travel accessory to ensure long journeys don’t drag.
description: Kids love it too Keep the kids occupied when travelling with our plush tablet holder. They can play games, do their homework, study, read their favorite book or watch their favorite show in comfort. Great for road trips, vacations or even for keeping little ones occupied in a restaurant, on a lounger at the pool or waiting at an appointment. Have it to hand to ensure your child, tween or teenager can view their portable device in total comfort. 2 convenient angles With 2 different angles to utilize, you can place our travel tablet cushion in the most comfortable way for you. Test which one works best for you then sit back and relax. You may have multiple devices for which different angles work better than others, but you can be safe in the knowledge that our tablet cushion will offer you ultimate comfort whatever you choose to do on your journey. Soft and easy to use The super soft plush design means no sharp edges. The rounded angles not only keep your device in place, but they also ensure there is nothing to damage or scratch your devices. Even the side pocket is made from mesh so anything you store there is kept safe. Perfect for small accessories such as leads, travel candy, your phone or something else that is small and handy to have nearby. BUY NOW and work comfortably on the go with our Brookstone tablet cushion
